title: Committed Step 1 patch: unified diff + bundled zip + 8 Tauri commands

fields.vision: Red Team Phase II-A proper handoff is a file-level implementation packet with a unified diff, bundled zip, and eight Tauri commands.
fields.mechanism: It records Step 1 as file-level syntax-checked, includes command-registry work, and distinguishes handoff-done from cargo-check-verified implementation-done.
fields.built_components: Documented handoff or prototype; live status still to verify
fields.source_utilization: Research design, evidence evaluation, forecasting, and judgment. Use source library method and reasoning sources as public method and source background. Vision: Make methodology pages legible as research-design, evidence-control, and interpretive-method systems. Mechanism: Extract argument, warrant, close reading, corpus method, reasoning, evidence, and analytic-logic mechanisms. Plan: Strengthen source governance, evidence workbench, capstone, and Nexus method pages. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact methodological passages for claim-control upgrades. Source pool: 129 deduplicated local title candidates; 136 catalogue support rows. Examples: Argumentation; From Human Reasoning to Belief. Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling. Mechanism: Extract creativity, network, learning, imagination, leadership, and project-generation mechanisms. Plan: Rewrite Nexus and planning pages around upstream/downstream project movement. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact project-method and creativity passages. Source pool: 151 deduplicated local title candidates; 154 catalogue support rows. Examples: Creativity Research; The Heritage, Creativity and Innovation Nexus. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship evidence. Catalogue rows are preferred for authors where available. This strengthens page vision, mechanism...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Upload this zip to a new GPT chat when (a) Step 1 still needs to be applied to the live repo, or (b) continuation should move directly to Step 2 analytical core if Step 1 has been accepted. Reading order is 01_STATUS — 03_PROVENANCE — 06_CURRENT_STATE/IMPLEMENTATION_STATE_AUDIT — CANON_VS_LIVE_DELTA — REMAINING_PASSES_AND_ROADMAP — STEP2_ANALYTICAL_CORE_SPEC — STEP1_PATCH_NOTES — open governing archive. Wire or preserve the implementation files: Unified diff file (murano_red_team_step1_patch.diff) - Bundled patch zip - 8 new Tauri commands: red_team_create_source, red_team_update_source, red_team_delete_source, red_team_create_blocker, red_team_update_blocker, red_team_create_assumption, red_team_update_assumption, red_team_append_session; red_team_update_project expanded; red_team_health_check tightened to active projects
fields.status: Documented handoff or prototype; live status still to verify
fields.remaining_gaps: Retain the packet as a completed authority layer, then decide whether it should remain a reference file or become a live room, method page, or public proof object.
fields.detailed_source_vision: This zip is the first of the April handoff lineage to package a concrete Step 1 implementation patch alongside the governing 2026-03-30 replacement archive. Unlike later archival-only packages, this one carries a unified diff (murano_red_team_step1_patch.diff) and a bundled patch zip implementing "Phase II-A — Durable Project Spine" against the preserved Phase I snapshot. It is the only package in the 11 that couples a governing archive with an actual patch work product positioned for live-repo application. It does not claim Red Team Lab is complete. It distinguishes handoff-DONE from implementation-DONE, labels Step 1 as file-level syntax-checked but not cargo check verified end-to-end, and declares three further implementation passes beyond Step 1 (analytical core, exercise/deliverables, export/archive) plus an optional release-hardening pass.
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.what_it_is: Red Team Phase II-A proper handoff is a file-level implementation packet with a unified diff, bundled zip, and eight Tauri commands.
public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: It records Step 1 as file-level syntax-checked, includes command-registry work, and distinguishes handoff-done from cargo-check-verified implementation-done.
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It matters because it gives implementation evidence while refusing to overclaim end-to-end verification.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: rendered correction table.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.
